name: Quantum Computing Inc.
summary: Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) is a Delaware-incorporated company based in Hoboken, New Jersey that uses integrated photonics and non-linear quantum optics to develop machines for quantum computing, machine learning, remote sensing, imaging, and cybersecurity. Its flagship product is the Entropy Quantum Computer (EQC), which operates at room temperature. QCi also develops thin film lithium niobate (TFLN) photonic integrated circuits and acquired Luminar Semiconductor Inc. in February 2026 to expand photonic chip and aerospace/defense capabilities.
